ideation: This sequence simulates flexing biceps, emphasizing the strength and power of the gesture.  The robot will flex one arm at a time, alternating between arms, to showcase the strength in each.  The other arm will remain relaxed at the side, providing contrast and balance.  I will use the robot's shoulder joints (joint1 and joint2) along with wrist positioning to create a convincing flexing motion.  The sequence will start with both arms relaxed, move to a flex of the left bicep, then the right, and finish with both arms relaxed again.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
left arm tenses and flexes powerfully
arms switch, right arm tenses and flexes
